instruction: Use the prompt from studio_bundle_packets.md, not the individual backup prompt.
Every winner, loser, and score must match the bundle accuracy lock exactly.
No team side, score side, scoreboard order, or logo side may be swapped.
Locked HSD watermark bug must appear consistently, top-left unless safe-zone conflict.
No fake jerseys, fake uniforms, fake logos, fake player images, or invented numbers.
Do not add stats, quotes, rankings, injuries, or milestones beyond the bundle.
Carousel must include the required branded CTA/end slide.
Export feed graphic at 1080x1350. Make story crop only when needed.
Caption must not add unsupported claims.
